name: oop-extension-safety
description: Always-on guards for OOP extension points: complete template methods, prefer primitive hook parameters, mock concrete injected types in tests, and declare concrete delegate types at the class level.

origin.note: Distilled from two production bugs in the Rogers/Fido carrier integration where inheritance extension points were bypassed or mis-typed. See CarrierIntegrationServer commits 613daf50 and 2a7152ea.
